summary: The patient has signs consistent with Dentinogenesis Imperfecta due to pulpal changes like obliterative lesions and narrowed canals without significant enamel damage; this condition runs in families supporting a genetic basis for the disorder among siblings. \boxed{Dentinogenesis Imperfecta}
